privacyBanner.heading: Your Opt-Out Preference Signal is Honored
privacyBanner.preLinkText: This confirms that we acknowledge your opt-out preference signal, such as Global Privacy Control or other authorized Universal Opt-Out Mechanism and will honor it for states with GPC requirements. You can click on
privacyBanner.postLinkText: to learn more and exercise other opt out rights you may have.

enabledOptUPFeedback.message: Do these insights help you better understand the health of your recent purchases?

item.description: Coca-Cola Vanilla Zero Sugar Fridge Pack Cans, 12 fl oz, 12 Pack
item.romanceDescription:
Soda. Pop. Soft drink. Sparkling beverage. Whatever you call it nothing compares to the refreshing taste of Coca-Cola Zero Sugar Vanilla. A little flavor can make a lot of magic happen and Coca-Cola Zero Sugar Vanilla is here to make your taste buds happy. Enjoy with friends on the go or with a meal. Whatever the occasion Coca-Cola Zero Sugar Vanilla makes life’s special moments a little bit better.Every sip every “ahhh ” every smile—find that feeling with Coca-Cola Zero Sugar Vanilla. Best enjoyed ice cold for maximum refreshment. Grab a Coca-Cola Zero Sugar Vanilla and find your “ahhh” moment.Enjoy Coca-Cola Zero Sugar Vanilla.

  • Delicious combination of Coca-Cola Zero Sugar and vanilla flavor
  • Zero sugar in every sip
  • 34 mg of caffeine in each 12 oz serving
  • 12 FL OZ in each can
  • This sparkling beverage is best enjoyed ice-cold for maximum refreshment

data.header: This site contains external links. By clicking on external links, you'll be leaving this site and will be subject to the privacy policy and terms & conditions on those external sites.
Keep your Team Healthy - Schedule Employee Vaccinations Today.
In select states, stock up for school and skip the sales tax on select items during Tax-free Days.
Eligible Medicare patients may qualify for select GLP-1 weight loss medications for $50/month through the Medicare Weight Loss GLP-1 Bridge Program.

data.text: To provide and personalize our offerings, make recommendations, detect and prevent fraud, and improve our services, we use tools that collect and record your data, which may include your searches for and purchases of health and wellness products. We also may share non-sensitive data with third parties, such as advertising and analytics vendors, social networks, technology providers, and research providers. By continuing to use our websites and apps and shop our stores, this means you consent to these practices and accept our Terms and our Privacy Policy.

By making a purchase from the Gift Card Mall, you agree to Blackhawk's Terms of Service, and any information you provide during the checkout process will be subject to the Blackhawk Network Privacy Policy.

data.heading: Enter to Win
data.body: You are now leaving Kroger.com and going to a third-party site. The Kroger Co., and its subsidiaries and affiliates, is not affiliated with or responsible for the sweepstake.

You are being redirected to betsafe.com. Betsafe.com is controlled and operated by Betsson U.S. Corp. (“Betsson”), a third-party sportsbook licensed by the State of Colorado Division of Gaming. Any information that you choose to share with Betsson (or that Betsson automatically collects through your use of its applications or website) will be controlled by Betsson and subject to its terms and conditions and privacy policy. {banner} does not assume any responsibility for third party websites or applications and all use is at your own risk.

data.body: By clicking “Join Now”, you will be leaving the Kroger Family of Companies and going to a website not operated by us. You will be subject to the privacy policy and terms & conditions of the e-Rewards® website (not those of the Kroger Family of Companies)
